scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,server -c blue,green "corepack pnpm dev:web" "corepack pnpm dev:server"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @streamify/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @streamify/server build && corepack pnpm --filter @streamify/web build
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @streamify/shared lint && corepack pnpm --filter @streamify/server lint && corepack pnpm --filter @streamify/web lint
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @streamify/shared typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @streamify/server typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @streamify/web typecheck
